tasks.instruction: Complete each sentence with one word. The dashes show you the missing letters.

items.stem: There was h _ _ _ _ rain last night and the streets were flooded.
Be careful! There is a s _ _ _ _ _ wind blowing today.
We had f _ _ _ food for lunch because we were in a hurry.
In big cities, many people use p _ _ _ _ _ transport to get to work.
We were late because there was a terrible t _ _ _ _ _ _ jam on the motorway.
Anna is my b _ _ _ friend — we do everything together.
